# My baby Ella born on April 24, 2017 at 12:17 AM. I'm so fortune toÉ*Created: Wednesday, April 25, 2018 at 11:56:43?PM*<div>My baby Ella born on April 24, 2017 at 12:17 AM. I'm so fortune to have a family; my wife Marina and my baby daughter Ella. She's precious, small and stunningly resilient in many ways. Her temperamental tendicies of attention are necessary to her survival and I'm happy to give her the attention she fully deserves. <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>Look at this gentle and sweet baby who smiles while being less than 48-hours old. I cannot get enough pleasure and enough time with my baby. <br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>My precious wife is so strong and truly remarbale in her power to stay focused and calm no matter if my Ella cries or poops her self. I've lost a temper a few times because I just want to protect both of them. </div>
